message:
ci: Improve GitHub Actions workflows with security and performance best practices

Changes to ci.yml:
- Add concurrency groups to cancel redundant runs on same branch/PR
- Add explicit permissions block (contents: read) for security
- Pin ludeeus/action-shellcheck to v2.0.0 instead of @master for reproducibility
- Add Homebrew caching for macOS jobs to speed up bash installation
- Add timeout-minutes for test jobs (30min) and install-test (10min)
- Remove continue-on-error from TAP tests to properly fail on errors
- Add explicit names to checkout steps for clarity
- Remove emojis from output messages for cleaner logs

Changes to release.yml:
- Add concurrency group to prevent concurrent releases
- Upgrade softprops/action-gh-release from v1 to v2
- Add fail_on_unmatched_files: true for safety
- Add conditional check for HOMEBREW_TAP_TOKEN existence
- Add repository variable check (HOMEBREW_TAP_ENABLED) for forks
- Include sha and actor in dispatch payload for traceability

Changes to notify-acfs.yml:
- Consolidate functionality from acfs-checksums-dispatch.yml (now deleted)
- Add explicit permissions block (empty - no permissions needed)
- Add concurrency group to prevent duplicate notifications
- Add workflow_dispatch input for manual trigger reason
- Improve dispatch payload with additional context
- Add repository variable check for enabling in forks

New files:
- .github/dependabot.yml: Weekly updates for GitHub Actions

These changes follow GitHub Actions security best practices and improve
CI performance through caching and concurrency management.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,20 @@
+# Dependabot configuration for GitHub Actions
+# Keeps action versions up to date with security patches and improvements
+
+version: 2
+updates:
+  - package-ecosystem: "github-actions"
+    directory: "/"
+    schedule:
+      interval: "weekly"
+      day: "monday"
+      time: "09:00"
+      timezone: "America/New_York"
+    open-pull-requests-limit: 5
+    commit-message:
+      prefix: "ci"
+    labels:
+      - "dependencies"
+      - "github-actions"
+    reviewers:
+      - "Dicklesworthstone"

@@ -1,30 +0,0 @@
-name: Notify ACFS checksum monitor
-

-  push:

-  workflow_dispatch:

-jobs:

-    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
-    steps:
-      - name: Ensure dispatch token
-        if: ${{ secrets.ACFS_REPO_DISPATCH_TOKEN == '' }}
-        run: |

-          exit 1

@@ -1,5 +1,7 @@
 # CI Workflow for repo_updater (ru)
 # Runs on every push and PR to main
+#
+# Security: Uses minimal permissions and pinned action versions
 
 name: CI
 
@@ -10,15 +12,25 @@ on:
     branches: [main]
   workflow_dispatch:
 
+# Cancel in-progress runs for the same branch/PR
+concurrency:
+  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
+  cancel-in-progress: true
+
+# Minimal permissions - read-only access to repository contents
+permissions:
+  contents: read
+
 jobs:
   shellcheck:
     name: ShellCheck
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - name: Checkout repository
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
       - name: Run ShellCheck
-        uses: ludeeus/action-shellcheck@master
+        uses: ludeeus/action-shellcheck@2.0.0
         with:
           scandir: '.'
           severity: warning
@@ -28,7 +40,8 @@ jobs:
     name: Bash Syntax
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - name: Checkout repository
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
       - name: Check ru syntax
         run: bash -n ru
@@ -51,8 +64,22 @@ jobs:
       matrix:
         os: [ubuntu-latest, macos-latest]
     runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
+    timeout-minutes: 30
     steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - name: Checkout repository
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Setup Homebrew cache (macOS)
+        if: runner.os == 'macOS'
+        uses: actions/cache@v4
+        with:
+          path: |
+            ~/Library/Caches/Homebrew
+            /usr/local/Cellar/bash
+            /opt/homebrew/Cellar/bash
+          key: ${{ runner.os }}-homebrew-bash-${{ hashFiles('.github/workflows/ci.yml') }}
+          restore-keys: |
+            ${{ runner.os }}-homebrew-bash-
 
       - name: Install bash 5 (macOS)
         if: runner.os == 'macOS'
@@ -67,11 +94,11 @@ jobs:
         run: mkdir -p test-results
 
       - name: Run all tests (TAP format)
+        id: tap_tests
         run: ./scripts/run_all_tests.sh --tap 2>&1 | tee test-results/tests.tap
-        continue-on-error: true
 
       - name: Run all tests (human-readable)
-        if: always()
+        if: failure() || success()
         run: ./scripts/run_all_tests.sh 2>&1 | tee test-results/tests.log
 
       - name: Upload test results
@@ -90,8 +117,22 @@ jobs:
       matrix:
         os: [ubuntu-latest, macos-latest]
     runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
+    timeout-minutes: 10
     steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - name: Checkout repository
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Setup Homebrew cache (macOS)
+        if: runner.os == 'macOS'
+        uses: actions/cache@v4
+        with:
+          path: |
+            ~/Library/Caches/Homebrew
+            /usr/local/Cellar/bash
+            /opt/homebrew/Cellar/bash
+          key: ${{ runner.os }}-homebrew-bash-${{ hashFiles('.github/workflows/ci.yml') }}
+          restore-keys: |
+            ${{ runner.os }}-homebrew-bash-
 
       - name: Install bash 5 (macOS)
         if: runner.os == 'macOS'
@@ -109,7 +150,7 @@ jobs:
       - name: Verify installation
         run: |
           test -x /tmp/ru-test/ru
-          echo "✓ ru is installed and executable"
+          echo "ru is installed and executable"
 
       - name: Check version output
         run: |
@@ -132,7 +173,8 @@ jobs:
     name: Version Consistency
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - name: Checkout repository
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
       - name: Check VERSION file exists
         run: |
@@ -155,4 +197,4 @@ jobs:
             exit 1
           fi
 
-          echo "✓ Versions are consistent: $file_version"
+          echo "Versions are consistent: $file_version"

@@ -1,28 +1,59 @@
 # .github/workflows/notify-acfs.yml
 #
-# Notifies ACFS when installer scripts change, triggering checksum updates.
-# Use this template for repos with install.sh at the repository root.
+# Notifies ACFS (agentic_coding_flywheel_setup) when installer scripts change,
+# triggering checksum updates in the downstream repository.
+#
+# This workflow consolidates installer change notifications and release events
+# into a single workflow to avoid duplication.
 #
 # Setup:
 #   1. Create a PAT with 'contents:read' on agentic_coding_flywheel_setup
 #   2. Add it as a secret named ACFS_REPO_DISPATCH_TOKEN in this repo
-#   3. Copy this file to .github/workflows/notify-acfs.yml
+#   3. Optionally set ACFS_NOTIFICATIONS_ENABLED=true in repository variables
 #
 # Related: agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-b04c
-#
+
 name: Notify ACFS of Installer Changes
 
 on:
   push:
     branches: [main, master]
     paths:
       - 'install.sh'
-  workflow_dispatch:  # Manual trigger for testing
+      - 'scripts/install.sh'
+  release:
+    types: [published]
+  workflow_dispatch:
+    inputs:
+      reason:
+        description: 'Reason for manual trigger'
+        required: false
+        default: 'Manual checksum update'
+
+# Minimal permissions - no repository access needed
+permissions: {}
+
+# Prevent duplicate notifications for the same commit
+concurrency:
+  group: acfs-notify-${{ github.sha }}
+  cancel-in-progress: false
 
 jobs:
   notify-acfs:
+    name: Trigger ACFS Checksum Update
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    # Only run if enabled or in the main repository
+    if: ${{ vars.ACFS_NOTIFICATIONS_ENABLED == 'true' || github.repository == 'Dicklesworthstone/repo_updater' }}
     steps:
+      - name: Validate dispatch token exists
+        id: validate
+        run: |
+          if [[ -z "${{ secrets.ACFS_REPO_DISPATCH_TOKEN }}" ]]; then
+            echo "::error::Missing secret ACFS_REPO_DISPATCH_TOKEN"
+            echo "::error::Add a PAT with repo access for Dicklesworthstone/agentic_coding_flywheel_setup"
+            exit 1
+          fi
+
       - name: Trigger ACFS checksum update
         uses: peter-evans/repository-dispatch@v3
         with:
@@ -32,15 +63,19 @@ jobs:
           client-payload: |
             {
               "tool": "${{ github.event.repository.name }}",
+              "repo": "${{ github.repository }}",
               "ref": "${{ github.ref }}",
               "sha": "${{ github.sha }}",
+              "event": "${{ github.event_name }}",
               "actor": "${{ github.actor }}",
-              "timestamp": "${{ github.event.head_commit.timestamp }}"
+              "timestamp": "${{ github.event.head_commit.timestamp || github.event.release.published_at || '' }}",
+              "reason": "${{ github.event.inputs.reason || '' }}"
             }
 
-      - name: Log dispatch
+      - name: Log dispatch result
         run: |
-          echo "✅ Dispatched upstream-changed event to ACFS"
-          echo "   Tool: ${{ github.event.repository.name }}"
-          echo "   SHA: ${{ github.sha }}"
-          echo "   Triggered by: ${{ github.actor }}"
+          echo "Dispatched upstream-changed event to ACFS"
+          echo "  Tool: ${{ github.event.repository.name }}"
+          echo "  SHA: ${{ github.sha }}"
+          echo "  Event: ${{ github.event_name }}"
+          echo "  Triggered by: ${{ github.actor }}"

@@ -1,5 +1,7 @@
 # Release Workflow for repo_updater (ru)
 # Triggered by version tags (v*)
+#
+# Creates GitHub releases with checksums and notifies downstream package managers
 
 name: Release
 
@@ -8,15 +10,22 @@ on:
     tags:
       - 'v*'
 
+# Only write permission needed for creating releases
 permissions:
   contents: write
 
+# Prevent concurrent releases
+concurrency:
+  group: release-${{ github.ref }}
+  cancel-in-progress: false
+
 jobs:
   release:
     name: Create Release with Checksums
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - name: Checkout repository
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
       - name: Extract version from tag
         id: version
@@ -36,7 +45,7 @@ jobs:
             exit 1
           fi
 
-          echo "✓ Version check passed: $tag_version"
+          echo "Version check passed: $tag_version"
 
       - name: Verify VERSION file matches tag
         run: |
@@ -85,7 +94,7 @@ SHA256 checksums for this release are attached as `checksums.txt`.
 EOF
 
       - name: Create GitHub Release
-        uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v1
+        uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v2
         with:
           name: ru v${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}
           body_path: release_notes.md
@@ -97,6 +106,7 @@ EOF
             install.sh.sha256
           generate_release_notes: true
           append_body: true
+          fail_on_unmatched_files: true
 
     outputs:
       version: ${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}
@@ -108,8 +118,21 @@ EOF
     name: Notify Homebrew Tap
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     needs: release
+    # Only run if the secret is configured
+    if: ${{ vars.HOMEBREW_TAP_ENABLED == 'true' || github.repository == 'Dicklesworthstone/repo_updater' }}
     steps:
+      - name: Check for dispatch token
+        id: check_token
+        run: |
+          if [[ -z "${{ secrets.HOMEBREW_TAP_TOKEN }}" ]]; then
+            echo "::warning::HOMEBREW_TAP_TOKEN secret not configured - skipping Homebrew notification"
+            echo "skip=true" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+          else
+            echo "skip=false" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+          fi
+
       - name: Trigger formula update
+        if: steps.check_token.outputs.skip != 'true'
         uses: peter-evans/repository-dispatch@v3
         with:
           token: ${{ secrets.HOMEBREW_TAP_TOKEN }}
@@ -118,11 +141,14 @@ EOF
           client-payload: |
             {
               "tool": "ru",
-              "version": "${{ needs.release.outputs.version }}"
+              "version": "${{ needs.release.outputs.version }}",
+              "sha": "${{ github.sha }}",
+              "actor": "${{ github.actor }}"
             }
 
       - name: Log dispatch
+        if: steps.check_token.outputs.skip != 'true'
         run: |
-          echo "✅ Dispatched formula-update event to homebrew-tap"
-          echo "   Tool: ru"
-          echo "   Version: ${{ needs.release.outputs.version }}"
+          echo "Dispatched formula-update event to homebrew-tap"
+          echo "  Tool: ru"
+          echo "  Version: ${{ needs.release.outputs.version }}"
